planned_steps: Click Sign in button (recovery: try 'Log in' if primary selector fails)
Assert Dashboard is visible (confirms login success)
Scroll down 201px to find database in list
Click on database matching db_name (recovery: text variant support via {{db_name}} interpolation)
Scroll up 201px to reveal Delete Database button
Assert Delete Database button is visible
Click Delete Database button (recovery: try 'Delete' or 'Remove' if needed)
Fill sudo command field with 'sudo delete database {{db_name}}'
Assert Delete Database button still visible (confirms form readiness)
Click Delete Database to confirm deletion
